name: Rosehip Oil
description: A rich botanical oil packed with trans-retinoic acid and essential fatty acids for skin regeneration.
scientificSummary: Contains approximately 80% essential fatty acids (linoleic and alpha-linolenic acid) and naturally occurring trans-retinoic acid.
mechanismOfAction: Retinoic acid in the oil normalizes cell turnover while essential fatty acids reinforce the skin's lipid barrier.

seo.title: Rosehip Oil - Regenerating Botanical Oil | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Rosehip Oil fades scars, reduces pigmentation, and restores youthful elasticity.
